business information: Business Name: EM Consulting (also Elizabeth Morrison Consulting)
Founded by: Elizabeth Morrison (12 years in business)
Business Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Pacific
EM Consulting is the parent. Three service lines run under it:
The Lay Counselor Academy (Primary paid media focus)
Training program for non-licensed mental health counselors. One of two such programs in the US; the other is out of Harvard.
Direct counseling team. Employer-contracted and direct-to-consumer; SMS-first intake; counselors cross state lines.
Continued learning experiences for licensed clinicians and lay counselors.
Lay Counselor Academy paid media, with emphasis on the new Self-Paced async tier ($1,200) launched April 2026.
All three tiers in scope: Live ($5,500), Hybrid ($2,200), Self-Paced ($1,200).
B2C individual learners and B2B organizations both in funnel scope.
Flourish Counseling Services approved for paid media on discovery call. SMS-first intake gives near-100% lead-to-conversation rate.
Layered social ads possible at the $5k to $10k / month bracket once Google Ads stabilizes.
SEO compounding via Moonraker partnership; paid drives immediate fill, SEO compounds over time.
Spanish-speaking audience expansion already groundwork-laid (Spanish Stripe checkout live for the book).
Funding shift in 2024 to 2025 has shrunk her usual B2B buyer (nonprofits, Medicaid orgs, grant-funded workforce programs).
12-year track record without paid ads; product-market fit validated.
$150k invested in instructional design for the async product build.
The Lay Counselor Academy offers three tiers; lifetime access to course materials is included on all.
LMS platform: Teachfloor | Payment processor: Stripe
Track record: 1,500 students through the live course over 3 years; product-market fit validated without any paid media to date.
Coverage of the Lay Counselor Academy and the lay-counselor movement:
California Healthline Asian Health Center Tries Unconventional Approach to Counseling
Modesto Bee Severe shortage of mental health clinicians prompts Stanislaus County to try bold approach
